'''yanoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psaltry|psaltry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psaltry|psaltry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yanoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæneyeth|yæneyeth]] || [[word:yæneyej|yæneyej]] || [[word:yæneyesh|yæneyesh]] || [[word:yæneye|yæneye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yanonoyoth|yanonoyoth]] || [[word:yanonoyoj|yanonoyoj]] || [[word:yanonoyosh|yanonoyosh]] || [[word:yanonoyo|yanonoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yanoyoth|yanoyoth]] || [[word:yanoyoj|yanoyoj]] || [[word:yanoyosh|yanoyosh]] || [[word:yanoyo|yanoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yanofyoth|yanofyoth]] || [[word:yanofyoj|yanofyoj]] || [[word:yanofyosh|yanofyosh]] || [[word:yanofyof|yanofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yanoyotho|yanoyotho]] || [[word:yanoyojo|yanoyojo]] || [[word:yanoyosho|yanoyosho]] || [[word:yanoyoko|yanoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yanoyoth|yanoyoth]] || [[word:yanoyoj|yanoyoj]] || [[word:yanoyosh|yanoyosh]] || [[word:yanoyo|yanoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yanoyothol|yanoyothol]] || [[word:yanoyojol|yanoyojol]] || [[word:yanoyoshol|yanoyoshol]] || [[word:yanoyokol|yanoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yanoyothotho|yanoyothotho]] || [[word:yanoyojojo|yanoyojojo]] || [[word:yanoyoshosho|yanoyoshosho]] || [[word:yanoyoko|yanoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yanoyothon|yanoyothon]] || [[word:yanoyojon|yanoyojon]] || [[word:yanoyoshon|yanoyoshon]] || [[word:yanoyokon|yanoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yanoyothoro|yanoyothoro]] || [[word:yanoyojoro|yanoyojoro]] || [[word:yanoyoshoro|yanoyoshoro]] || [[word:yanoyokoro|yanoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
